pages.text: Two decoration-and-utility add-ons:$(br)$(li)$(italic)Create Deco$() — catwalks, palings, supports, and a full set of industrial building blocks and palettes.$(li)$(italic)Create: Bells & Whistles$() — train whistles, signals, display and signage utilities, and decorative pieces that fit the rail and factory aesthetic.
pages.title: Deco & B&W
